name._value: "Mar" the Fairy and the Water of Life

1._value: At #m10002000#, I ran into a fairy that's been busily studying the magic of life. Her name is "Mar" and after taking a look at my pet that's been turned into a doll, she told me she can make it come back alive with #b#t5180000##k and #b#t4031034##k. I heard that she knows #p219# of #m010001000#... since it looks like a pet trainer named #b#p222##k of #m010001000# knows something about the scroll of life, I should head over there...

2._value: After easily passing the test from #p222# of #m010001000#, I got a hold of #b#t5180000##k and #b#t4031034##k, and got that to #p317#. With her magical power and the items I got her, she turned the doll back into a living pet. I can hang out with him for a while longer now ... sweet ...
